name: Acid Burrower
description: A horse-sized insect with digging claws and acidic blood.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Burrower can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Earth Eruption
features.description: Have the Burrower burst out of the ground. All creatures within Very Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or be knocked over, making them Vulnerable until they next act.

features.name: Spit Acid
features.description: Make an attack against all targets in front of the Burrower within Close range. Targets the Burrower succeeds against take 2d6 physical damage and must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits. If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Acid Bath
features.description: When the Burrower takes Severe damage, all creatures within Close range are bathed in their acidic blood, taking 1d10 physical damage. This splash covers the ground within Very Close range with blood, and all creatures other than the Burrower who move through it take 1d6 physical damage.

name: Bear
description: A large bear with thick fur and powerful claws.

features.name: Overwhelming Force
features.description: Targets who mark HP from the Bear's standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.

features.name: Bite
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 3d4+10 physical damage and the target is Restrained until they break free with a successful Strength Roll.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Bear makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Cave Ogre
description: A massive humanoid who sees all sapient life as food.

features.name: Ramp Up
features.description: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Ogre. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.

features.name: Bone Breaker
features.description: The Ogre's attacks deal direct damage.

features.name: Hail of Boulders
features.description: Pick up heavy objects and throw them at all targets in front of the Ogre within Far range. Make an attack against these targets. Targets the Ogre succeeds against take 1d10+2 physical damage. If they succeed against more than one target, you gain a Fear.

features.name: Rampaging Fury
features.description: When the Ogre marks 2 or more HP, they can rampage. Move the Ogre to a point within Close range and deal 2d6+3 direct physical damage to all targets in their path.

name: Construct
description: A roughly humanoid being of stone and steel, assembled and animated by magic.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Construct can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Weak Structure
features.description: When the Construct marks HP from physical damage, they must mark an additional HP.

features.name: Trample
features.description: Make an attack against all targets in the Construct's path when they move. Targets the Construct succeeds against take 1d8 physical damage.

features.name: Overload
features.description: Before rolling damage for the Construct's attack, gain a +10 bonus to the damage roll. The Construct can then take the spotlight again.

features.name: Death Quake
features.description: When the Construct marks their last HP, the magic powering them ruptures in an explosion of force. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Very Close range.

name: Courtier
description: An ambitious and ostentatiously dressed socialite.

features.name: Mockery
features.description: Say something mocking and force a target within Close range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (14). On a failure, the target must mark 2 Stress and is Vulnerable until the scene ends.

features.name: Scapegoat
features.description: Target a PC. The Courtier convinces a crowd or prominent individual that the target is the cause of their current conflict or misfortune.

name: Deeproot Defender
description: A burly vegetable-person with grasping vines.

features.name: Ground Slam
features.description: Slam the ground, knocking all targets within Very Close range back to Far range. Each target knocked back this way must mark a Stress.

features.name: Grab and Drag
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, pull them into Melee range, deal 1d6+2 physical damage, and Restrain them until the Defender takes Severe damage.

name: Dire Wolf
description: A large wolf with menacing teeth, seldom encountered alone.

features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: If the Wolf makes a successful standard attack and another Dire Wolf is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d6+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Hobbling Strike
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 3d4+10 direct physical damage and make them Vulnerable until they clear at least 1 HP.

name: Giant Mosquitoes
description: Dozens of fist-sized mosquitoes, flying together for protection.

features.name: Horde (1d4+1)
features.description: When the Mosquitoes have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.

features.name: Flying
features.description: While flying, the Mosquitoes have a +2 bonus to their Difficulty.

features.name: Bloodsucker
features.description: When the Mosquitoes' attack causes a target to mark HP, force the target to mark an additional HP.

name: Giant Rat
description: A cat-sized rodent skilled at scavenging and survival.

features.name: Minion (3)
features.description: The Rat is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Rat, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Giant Rats within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 1 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Giant Scorpion
description: A human-sized arachnid with tearing claws and a stinging tail.

features.name: Double Strike
features.description: Make a standard attack against two targets within Melee range.

features.name: Venomous Stinger
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 1d4+4 physical damage and Poison them until their next rest or they succeed on a Knowledge Roll (16). While Poisoned, the target must roll a d6 before they make an action roll. On a result of 4 or lower, they must mark a Stress.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Scorpion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Glass Snake
description: A clear serpent with a massive head that leaves behind a glass shard trail wherever they go.

features.name: Armor-Shredding Shards
features.description: After a successful attack against the Snake within Melee range, the attacker must mark an Armor Slot. If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an HP.

features.name: Spinning Serpent
features.description: Make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Snake succeeds against take 1d6+1 physical damage.

features.name: Spitter
features.description: Introduce a d6 Spitter Die. When the Snake is in the spotlight, roll this die. On a result of 5 or higher, all targets in front of the Snake within Far range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d4 physical damage. The Snake can take the spotlight a second time this GM turn.

name: Harrier
description: A nimble fighter armed with javelins.

features.name: Maintain Distance
features.description: After making a standard attack, the Harrier can move anywhere within Far range.

features.name: Fall Back
features.description: When a creature moves into Melee range to make an attack, before the attack roll, move anywhere within Close range and make an attack against that creature. On a success, deal 1d10+2 physical damage.

name: Archer Guard
description: A tall guard bearing a longbow and quiver with arrows fletched in the settlement's colors.

features.name: Hobbling Shot
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Far range. On a success, deal 1d12+3 physical damage. If the target marks HP from this attack, they have disadvantage on Agility Rolls until they clear at least 1 HP.

name: Bladed Guard
description: An armored guard bearing a sword and shield painted in the settlement's colors.

features.name: Shield Wall
features.description: A creature who tries to move within Very Close range of the Guard must succeed on an Agility Roll. If additional Bladed Guards are standing in a line alongside the first, and each is within Melee range of another guard in the line, the Difficulty increases by the total number of guards in that line.

features.name: Detain
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, Restrain the target until they break free with a successful attack, Finesse Roll, or Strength Roll.

name: Head Guard
description: A seasoned guard with a mace, a whistle, and a bellowing voice.

features.name: Rally Guards
features.description: Spotlight the Head Guard and up to 2d4 allies within Far range.

features.name: On My Signal
features.description: Countdown (5). When the Head Guard is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. It ticks down when a PC makes an attack roll. When it triggers, all Archer Guards within Far range make a standard attack with advantage against the nearest target within their range. If any attacks succeed on the same target, combine their damage.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Head Guard makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Jagged Knife Bandit
description: A cunning criminal in a cloak bearing one of the gang's iconic knives.

features.name: Climber
features.description: The Bandit climbs just as easily as they run.

features.name: From Above
features.description: When the Bandit succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal 1d10+1 physical damage instead of their standard damage.

name: Merchant
description: A traveling merchant with wares from distant lands.

name: Sellsword
description: A battle-hardened mercenary for hire.

name: Spellblade
description: A warrior who channels magic through their blade.

name: Weaponmaster
description: A skilled fighter proficient with many weapons.

name: Skeleton Warrior
description: An animated skeleton wielding a rusted blade.

name: Skeleton Archer
description: An animated skeleton wielding a bow with eerie precision.

name: Skeleton Knight
description: An armored skeleton wielding a heavy weapon.

name: Skeleton Dredge
description: A barely-held-together skeleton clawing at the living.

features.name: Minion (5)
features.description: The Dredge is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Dredge, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

name: Shambling Zombie
description: A slow, rotting corpse animated by dark magic.

name: Brawny Zombie
description: A hulking zombie with unnatural strength.

name: Rotted Zombie
description: A decayed zombie barely holding together.

features.name: Minion (4)
features.description: The Zombie is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Zombie, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

name: Zombie Pack
description: A shambling group of undead, dangerous in numbers.

features.name: Horde (1d6+1)
features.description: When the Zombie Pack has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+1 physical damage instead.

features.name: Overwhelm
features.description: When a creature deals damage to the Zombie Pack, make a standard attack against that creature.

name: Patchwork Zombie Hulk
description: A massive zombie stitched together from multiple corpses.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Hulk can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

name: Swarm of Rats
description: A writhing mass of rats driven by hunger.

features.name: Horde (1d4)
features.description: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4 physical damage instead.

name: Minor Demon
description: A small demonic entity from the Outer Realms.

name: Minor Fire Elemental
description: A small being of living flame.

name: Minor Chaos Elemental
description: An unstable entity of pure chaotic energy.

name: Minor Treant
description: A small animated tree, guardian of the forest.

name: Young Dryad
description: A young nature spirit in humanoid form.

name: Sylvan Soldier
description: An elven warrior defending the woodlands.

name: Petty Noble
description: A minor noble with inflated self-importance.

name: Pirate Captain
description: A charismatic leader of a pirate crew.

name: Pirate Raiders
description: A rowdy group of pirates attacking together.

features.name: Horde (1d4+1)
features.description: When the Raiders have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.

name: Pirate Tough
description: A large, intimidating pirate enforcer.

name: Green Ooze
description: A translucent green blob of acid.

name: Red Ooze
description: A reddish, aggressive blob of corrosive slime.

name: Tiny Green Ooze
description: A small green blob spawned from a larger ooze.

features.name: Minion (4)
features.description: The Ooze is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Ooze, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

name: Tiny Red Ooze
description: A small red blob spawned from a larger ooze.

features.name: Minion (5)
features.description: The Ooze is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Ooze, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

name: Tangle Bramble
description: An animated thorny plant that lashes at intruders.

name: Tangle Bramble Swarm
description: A writhing mass of thorny vines.

features.name: Horde (1d4)
features.description: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4 physical damage instead.

name: Jagged Knife Hexer
description: A staff-wielding bandit in a cloak adorned with magical paraphernalia, using curses to vex their foes.

features.name: Curse
features.description: Choose a target within Far range and temporarily Curse them. While the target is Cursed, you can mark a Stress when that target rolls with Hope to make the roll be with Fear instead.

features.name: Chaotic Flux
features.description: Make an attack against up to three targets within Very Close range. Mark a Stress to deal 2d6+3 magic damage to targets the Hexer succeeded against.

name: Jagged Knife Kneebreaker
description: An imposing brawler carrying a large club.

features.name: I've Got 'Em
features.description: Creatures Restrained by the Kneebreaker take double damage from attacks by other adversaries.

features.name: Hold Them Down
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target takes no damage but is Restrained and Vulnerable. The target can break free, clearing both conditions, with a successful Strength Roll or is freed automatically if the Kneebreaker takes Major or greater damage.

name: Jagged Knife Lackey
description: A thief with simple clothes and small daggers, eager to prove themselves.

features.name: Minion (3)
features.description: The Lackey is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Lackey, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Jagged Knife Lackeys within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Jagged Knife Lieutenant
description: A seasoned bandit in quality leathers with a strong voice and cunning eyes.

features.name: Tactician
features.description: When you spotlight the Lieutenant, mark a Stress to also spotlight two allies within Close range.

features.name: More Where That Came From
features.description: Summon three Jagged Knife Lackeys, who appear at Far range.

features.name: Coup de Grace
features.description: Make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Close range. On a success, deal 2d6+12 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Lieutenant makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Jagged Knife Shadow
description: A nimble scoundrel bearing a wicked knife and utilizing shadow magic to isolate targets.

features.name: Backstab
features.description: When the Shadow succeeds on a standard attack that has advantage, they deal 1d6+6 physical damage instead of their standard damage.

features.name: Cloaked
features.description: Become Hidden until after the Shadow's next attack. Attacks made while Hidden from this feature have advantage.

name: Jagged Knife Sniper
description: A lanky bandit striking from cover with a shortbow.

features.name: Unseen Strike
features.description: If the Sniper is Hidden when they make a successful standard attack against a target, they deal 1d10+4 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
